decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of card advantage, spell pierce, and removal spells. By using cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom, the player can draw additional cards while controlling the opponent's board with cards like Artist's Talent and Combustion Technique. With a mix of counterspells like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare, along with Iroh's Demonstration for added defense, this deck aims to outvalue and outpace the opponent while maintaining board control. The deck also has a strong mana base with Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal to support its strategy.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. By using cards like Abandon Attachments and Firebending Lesson to control the board, along with powerful finishers like Iroh's Demonstration and Combustion Technique, this deck aims to outlast and outvalue its opponents. With a focus on tempo and efficiency, combined with the flexibility of instant-speed interaction, this deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's game plan while advancing its own win conditions.

This Golgari Control deck focuses on using a variety of spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategies and gain control of the game. By utilizing cards like Day of Black Sun and Requiting Hex to remove threats and cards like Esper Origins and The Rise of Sozin to generate card advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and grind them out. Additionally, the inclusion of versatile creatures like Mutagen Man and Leatherhead provide additional disruption and threats to keep the opponent on their toes.

The deck focuses on using cheap and efficient spells to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent. By combining creatures with abilities that trigger when spells are cast and a variety of spell cards like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to control the battlefield and deal damage quickly. The inclusion of cards like Stock Up and Sleight of Hand help maintain card advantage and ensure the deck can maintain its aggressive tempo. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. It utilizes cards like Gran-Gran and Accumulate Wisdom to generate card advantage, while also using spells like Combustion Technique and Artist's Talent to deal with threats on the board. Monument to Endurance and It'll Quench Ya! provide additional resources and resilience. The deck also includes powerful planeswalkers like Agna Qel'a and April O'Neil, Hacktivist to further control the game. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through careful resource management and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. By combining Izzet Control cards with Avatar: The Last Airbender themed spells, the deck aims to use Ral and Toph's abilities to control the board while also building card advantage. The deck focuses on tempo plays and efficiently dealing with threats on the opponent's side of the board, while also utilizing powerful synergy between cards like Combustion Technique and Abandon Attachments for maximum value.

The focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively play creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and maintain momentum with efficient card draw and manipulation. The inclusion of bounce and control spells like Boomerang Basics and Wild Ride provide disruption to the opponent's board state, allowing for continued aggression. With a focus on tempo and card advantage, the deck seeks to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on removing opponent's threats and controlling the game through counterspells and burn spells. The key concept revolves around maintaining board control using cards like Abandon Attachments, Eddymurk Crab, and Sunderflock, while also disrupting opponent's plays with counters like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by efficiently drawing cards with Opt and Sleight of Hand, while also having removal options like Burst Lightning and Abrade. Overall, the strategy is to outlast opponents by controlling the game tempo and winning through attrition.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures, using cards like Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer to build a strong board presence. Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension help ramp up mana for powerful plays, while Sazh's Chocobo and Icetill Explorer provide card advantage. The deck also includes some control elements with Archdruid's Charm and Royal Treatment, along with a touch of versatility with cards like Promising Vein and Escape Tunnel. Overall, the goal is to apply constant pressure and outpace the opponent to secure a swift victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells. The key strategy is to disrupt your opponent's plans while building up your own resources. Cards like Abandon Attachments and Boomerang Basics help to deal with threats on the board, while Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent provide card advantage. Stormchaser's Talent and Combustion Technique can help to finish off your opponent once you have control of the game. With the right timing and strategy, this deck can outlast and outmaneuver almost any opponent.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a combination of spells and abilities to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Monument to Endurance, Abandon Attachments, and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to maintain dominance and outsmart the opponent. With a mix of card draw, removal, and counter spells, the deck seeks to outpace the opponent and secure victory through careful planning and tactical gameplay. The deck also includes some powerful creature cards like Gran-Gran and Agna Qel'a to apply pressure and close out the game when needed.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through various spells and abilities, utilizing a mix of removal, card draw, and counterspells to keep the opponent at bay. The deck also includes ramp elements to accelerate into powerful threats, while maintaining card advantage and board presence. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards a strong late game position, ultimately outlasting the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control spells and card draw to outlast opponents while maintaining board control. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Artist's Talent, and Accumulate Wisdom, the deck can effectively deal with threats and keep the opponent's resources in check. The inclusion of powerful cards like Agna Qel'a, Iroh's Demonstration, and Combustion Technique provides the deck with strong finishers to close out games. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and card advantage engines, this Control - Izzet Control deck aims to control the game tempo and secure victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up your board presence with mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer to beef up your creatures for quick damage. Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Webstrike Elite provide additional threats, while Escape Tunnel and Sapling Nursery offer protection and card advantage. Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub provide additional support, with Archdruid's Charm and Icetill Explorer rounding out the deck with some control options. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm your opponent early and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on using cheap, efficient spells and creatures to quickly pressure and overwhelm the opponent. Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off provide tempo advantage while Eddymurk Crab and Riverpyre Verge offer early board presence. Sleight of Hand and Opt help smooth out draws, while Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off offer direct damage and removal. Elusive Otter and Stormchaser's Talent serve as the primary threats, supported by Stock Up for card advantage. Multiversal Passage allows for color fixing, and Wild Ride provides additional aggressive pressure. The deck aims to close out games quickly through aggression and efficient spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on high aggression and quick damage output to overwhelm opponents. The deck includes a mix of low-cost creatures with strong attack capabilities and instant damage spells to clear the way for attacks. The key strategy is to maintain a fast pace and pressure the opponent constantly, utilizing the speed and efficiency of red and white cards. With a combination of creatures with haste and burn spells, this deck aims to finish the game swiftly before the opponent can establish a strong defense.
